meaning: adj.静态的,静力的 静电噪声
examples: My hair gets full of static when I brush it.
When the weather turns cold and dry, my clothes develop a static problem.
After only a minute an authoritative voice came through the static on the radio.
So how does a static, written plan work when a business is always in motion?
Compared to the vast majority of static, reflective signs, these radar-display systems are relatively rare.
